title: Update User Setting
content:
# Update User Setting

Updates an existing User Setting  `payload` with any new values.

## Endpoint

`POST /users/settings/{setting_name}/update`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.user.updateUserSettings()
print(response)

parameters.name: setting_name
parameters.description: The User Setting key `setting_name`. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

payload.description: The new payload for the User Setting. The structure of this `payload` object depends on the type of User Setting being updated.

created.description: UTC time when the User Setting was created, formatted in RFC 3339.

payload.description: The User Settings. The structure of this `payload` object depends on the type of User Setting being defined.

updated.description: UTC time when any User Setting keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.
